race.comment: TESTY PHAROAH (2) resumes. Won on debut to launch the last campaign over 1100m at Kalgoorlie. Two back was only beaten 2L over 1200m in Stakes grade, and he placed in a recent Belmont trial. Has the rail and the class to be winning. SEASTIC (9) broke her maiden three starts back and led beaten 1.2L at Pinjarra two weeks ago over this distance. Draws to advantage and has the blinkers on for the first time. Peaks and she's a solid each-way play.  REGGIO CALABRIA (1) has been busting to win again and his narrow defeat two back this track/trip stacks up. Has a handy 2kg claim and can get into the finish. DIABLO LAD (4) drops back to a sprint and won't be far away with average luck. CAPRICIOUS RULER (3) also presents back in trip and will push forward and give a sight.
